mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dy_license_app ( dls_app_dpp_keyno, dls_app_plant, dls_app_vol1, dls_app_vol2, dls_app_address, dls_app_form, dls_app_appDate, dls_app_dueDate, dls_app_appNum, dls_app_cusNum, dls_app_appPeriod, dls_app_module, dls_app_inverter, dls_app_appModule, dls_app_weight, dls_app_jsgDate, dls_app_swgDate, dls_app_jgjDate, dls_app_jgpDate, dls_now ) VALUES ( #{dls_dpp_keyno}, #{dls_app_plant}, #{dls_app_vol1}, #{dls_app_vol2}, #{dls_app_address}, #{dls_app_form}, #{dls_app_appDate}, #{dls_app_dueDate}, #{dls_app_appNum}, #{dls_app_cusNum}, #{dls_app_appPeriod}, #{dls_app_module}, #{dls_app_inverter}, #{dls_app_appModule}, #{dls_app_weight}, #{dls_app_jsgDate}, #{dls_app_swgDate}, #{dls_app_jgjDate}, #{dls_app_jgpDate}, #{dls_now} );
mapper.update:
UPDATE dy_license_app SET dls_app_plant = #{dls_app_plant}, dls_app_vol1 = #{dls_app_vol1}, dls_app_vol2 = #{dls_app_vol2}, dls_app_address = #{dls_app_address}, dls_app_form = #{dls_app_form}, dls_app_appDate = #{dls_app_appDate}, dls_app_dueDate = #{dls_app_dueDate}, dls_app_appNum = #{dls_app_appNum}, dls_app_cusNum = #{dls_app_cusNum}, dls_app_appPeriod = #{dls_app_appPeriod}, dls_app_module = #{dls_app_module}, dls_app_inverter = #{dls_app_inverter}, dls_app_appModule = #{dls_app_appModule}, dls_app_weight = #{dls_app_weight}, dls_app_jsgDate = #{dls_app_jsgDate}, dls_app_swgDate = #{dls_app_swgDate}, dls_app_jgjDate = #{dls_app_jgjDate}, dls_app_jgpDate = #{dls_app_jgpDate}
WHERE dls_app_dpp_keyno = #{dls_dpp_keyno} and dls_now = #{dls_now}
mapper.select: select * from dy_license_man where dls_man_dpp_keyno = #{dls_dpp_keyno} and dls_now = '1'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dy_license_man ( dls_man_dpp_keyno, dls_man_ceoName, dls_man_ceoAddress, dls_man_ceoPhone, dls_man_ceoEmail, dls_man_daeName, dls_man_daeDepart, dls_man_daePostion, dls_man_daePhone, dls_man_daeEmail, dls_man_govName, dls_man_govDepart, dls_man_govPhone, dls_man_serCoName, dls_man_serName, dls_man_serDepart, dls_man_serPhone, dls_man_serEmail, dls_man_gamName, dls_man_gamPeriod, dls_now, dls_man_type ) VALUES ( #{dls_dpp_keyno}, #{dls_man_ceoName}, #{dls_man_ceoAddress}, #{dls_man_ceoPhone}, #{dls_man_ceoEmail}, #{dls_man_daeName}, #{dls_man_daeDepart}, #{dls_man_daePostion}, #{dls_man_daePhone}, #{dls_man_daeEmail}, #{dls_man_govName}, #{dls_man_govDepart}, #{dls_man_govPhone}, #{dls_man_serCoName}, #{dls_man_serName}, #{dls_man_serDepart}, #{dls_man_serPhone}, #{dls_man_serEmail}, #{dls_man_gamName}, #{dls_man_gamPeriod}, #{dls_now}, #{dls_man_type} );
mapper.update:
UPDATE dy_license_man SET dls_man_ceoName = #{dls_man_ceoName}, dls_man_ceoAddress = #{dls_man_ceoAddress}, dls_man_ceoPhone = #{dls_man_ceoPhone}, dls_man_ceoEmail = #{dls_man_ceoEmail}, dls_man_daeName = #{dls_man_daeName}, dls_man_daeDepart = #{dls_man_daeDepart}, dls_man_daePostion = #{dls_man_daePostion}, dls_man_daePhone = #{dls_man_daePhone}, dls_man_daeEmail = #{dls_man_daeEmail}, dls_man_govName = #{dls_man_govName}, dls_man_govDepart = #{dls_man_govDepart}, dls_man_govPhone = #{dls_man_govPhone}, dls_man_serCoName = #{dls_man_serCoName}, dls_man_serName = #{dls_man_serName}, dls_man_serDepart = #{dls_man_serDepart}, dls_man_serPhone = #{dls_man_serPhone}, dls_man_serEmail = #{dls_man_serEmail}, dls_man_gamName = #{dls_man_gamName}, dls_man_gamPeriod = #{dls_man_gamPeriod}, dls_man_type = #{dls_man_type}
WHERE dls_man_dpp_keyno = #{dls_dpp_keyno} and dls_now = #{dls_now}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dy_license_com ( dls_com_dpp_keyno, dls_com_moName, dls_com_moVolum, dls_com_moQuantity, dls_com_moEtc, dls_com_inName, dls_com_invVolum, dls_com_inQuantity, dls_com_inEtc, dls_com_connName, dls_com_connVolum, dls_com_connQuantity, dls_com_connEtc, dls_now ) VALUES ( #{dls_dpp_keyno}, #{dls_com_moName}, #{dls_com_moVolum}, #{dls_com_moQuantity}, #{dls_com_moEtc}, #{dls_com_inName}, #{dls_com_invVolum}, #{dls_com_inQuantity}, #{dls_com_inEtc}, #{dls_com_connName}, #{dls_com_connVolum}, #{dls_com_connQuantity}, #{dls_com_connEtc}, #{dls_now} );
mapper.update:
UPDATE dy_license_com SET dls_com_moName = #{dls_com_moName}, dls_com_moVolum = #{dls_com_moVolum}, dls_com_moQuantity = #{dls_com_moQuantity}, dls_com_moEtc = #{dls_com_moEtc}, dls_com_inName = #{dls_com_inName}, dls_com_invVolum = #{dls_com_invVolum}, dls_com_inQuantity = #{dls_com_inQuantity}, dls_com_inEtc = #{dls_com_inEtc}, dls_com_connName = #{dls_com_connName}, dls_com_connVolum = #{dls_com_connVolum}, dls_com_connQuantity = #{dls_com_connQuantity}, dls_com_connEtc = #{dls_com_connEtc}
WHERE dls_com_dpp_keyno = #{dls_dpp_keyno} and dls_now = #{dls_now}
